prompt_text:
### Demographics: 58-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs; Recurrent hypoglycemia symptoms with irregular meals (about once weekly).

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis)
ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Peritoneal dialysis); HF (No); ASCVD: History of myocardial infarction; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 15 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~22.5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Glimepiride 4mg once daily; Repaglinide 1mg three times daily; Insulin Glargine 20units once daily; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 82.1 kg; Height 168.5 cm; BMI 28.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 127/83 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.9%; 9 months ago 9.3%; 6 months ago 9.8%; 3 months ago 10.0%; current 10.0%), FPG (12 months ago 200mg/dL; 9 months ago 240mg/dL; 6 months ago 279mg/dL; 3 months ago 286mg/dL; current 216mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 82.8kg; 9 months ago 80.9kg; 6 months ago 79.2kg; 3 months ago 79.3kg; current 82.1kg), Height (12 months ago 168.5cm; 9 months ago 168.5cm; 6 months ago 168.5cm; 3 months ago 168.5cm; current 168.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 28.0kg/m²; current 28.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 128mmHg; 9 months ago 133mmHg; 6 months ago 132mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 127mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 85mmHg; 9 months ago 87mmHg; 6 months ago 87mmHg; 3 months ago 84mmHg; current 83mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 17U/L; 9 months ago 17U/L; 6 months ago 16U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 13U/L), AST (12 months ago 22U/L; 9 months ago 30U/L; 6 months ago 30U/L; 3 months ago 28U/L; current 25U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 7.2mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 9.9mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 4.5mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 6.9mL/min/1.73m²; current 4mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 470mg/g; 9 months ago 354mg/g; 6 months ago 427mg/g; 3 months ago 631mg/g; current 491mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 90mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 96mg/dL; 3 months ago 93mg/dL; current 92mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 52mg/dL; 9 months ago 55mg/dL; 6 months ago 51mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 53mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 103mg/dL; 9 months ago 103mg/dL; 6 months ago 102mg/dL; 3 months ago 124mg/dL; current 114mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.8g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 9.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
